creator: jau@iki.fi
text:
Created attachment 185882
Upgrade radamsa from 0.3 to 0.5 changing the source repo to github.

This should be pretty much the same patch I put here on 2017-01-25.
If further changes seem to be necessary, I would obviously be glad
to hear what is needed, where, and why.

Obviously it would be nice to see someone with the commit bit to
finally commit this as well such that any additional patches, if
necessary could be created against the updated version.
The whole thing gets way too confusing for everybody, if further
patches need to be created against the old 0.3.
